aaaErrors.possibleResolutions:
- The payer likely needs more information about the subscriber to complete the eligibility check. We recommend providing the subscriber's `memberId`, `dateOfBirth`, `firstName`, and `lastName`. Given this information, all payers must return benefits details as long as they can find a unique match for the member within their system. Visit [patient information](https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/send-eligibility-checks#patient-information) to learn more.
• Try including the `provider.taxId`, typically their EIN or SSN.

additionalInformation.description: EXCEPTION=THE MEMBER IS COVERED HOWEVER, THE SPECIFIC PROCEDURE CODES REQUESTED ARE NOT A COVERED BENEFIT OF THIS PLAN. FOR A FULL SUMMARY OF BENEFITS OR ADDITIONAL CODE SPECIFIC INQUIRIES, PLEASE SUBMIT A NEW INQUIRY.
